suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 stability assessment and consolidation testing results
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 launched June 25 but multiple clients were offline (Prysm, Besu, Nethermind had bugs). Consolidation testing was pending. Need status update before proceeding to devnet-7 planning.

suggestions.topic: Finalize glamsterdam-devnet-7 EL scope: authorization metering approach
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #85 deferred this to 'this week's ACDE' (which would have been July 2). Open question on how to meter authorizations (EIP-8037 state growth + EIP-2780 transfer). Must be resolved before devnet-7 launch.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-7 launch timeline and client readiness
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-7 scope is set (EIP-7688 on CL, EL refinements only), but launch timing and client implementation status need confirmation. Erigon and Reth branches were still pending as of June 29.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8282 builder deposit contract parameters and disable-switch implementation
suggestions.rationale: Decision made to keep static constants and add disable-switch, but Felix's implementation of the disable-switch needs confirmation. Also need to finalize target=8, max=64 parameters proposed by Nico.

suggestions.topic: Builder API unhappy-path testing scope for final devnet designation
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #84 emphasized need for builder API testing at devnet level before any 'final devnet' designation. Devnet-7 was suggested as potentially the final ePBS devnet, so testing scope should be clarified.

suggestions.topic: PTC security concern resolution for ePBS readiness
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #84 raised PTC security concern (voting on non-canonical forks) as potential blocker for ePBS. Was deferred to CL breakout; outcome should be shared with broader group.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API implementation progress and breakout outcomes
suggestions.rationale: REST SSZ Engine API breakout call was scheduled for June 27. Multiple clients implementing (3+ implementations exist). Update on progress and alignment would be useful.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 benchmarking results and gas repricing finalization
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #81 noted benchmarking was the primary EL blocker for final gas costs. ACDT #82 mentioned 'numbers looking good'. Should confirm if benchmarking is complete and gas costs are finalized for Glamsterdam.
